raw_source.title: Exocore诚聘 QA&Testing工程师
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍
Founded in 2023, Exogenous, Inc. is a software technology company building Exocore, an omnichain pooled security protocol powering an open market for decentralized trust. Exocore is a blockchain infrastructure that connects to other L1 blockchains to allow restaking of existing staked L1 tokens or LSDs (liquid staking derivatives) to supply token-economic security to off-chain middleware protocols or applications. Restaking is a new category in the industry with huge potential to reshape how security is modeled and utilized by various security-focused applications.
### Core Team
Warren Paul Anderson, Co-founder and CEO [Warren](https://www.linkedin.com/in/warpaul1/) has been working full time in crypto and web3 for ten years. Warren was the CEO of [Discreet Labs](https://discreetlabs.io/) to lead a team of over 80 engineers and operators building scalable privacy systems using zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP) for web3.
Rongjian (”RJ”) Lan, Co-founder and CTO [RJ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rongjianlan/) has been working full-time in the blockchain space since 2018. Previously, RJ was the Co-founder and CTO of [Harmony](https://www.harmony.one/), where he led the development of the Harmony blockchain, which pioneered the introduction of sharding to PoS networks.
Raluca Ada Popa, Co-founder & Research Advisor [Raluca](https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~raluca/) is an Associate Professor of Computer Science at UC Berkeley. Her research focuses on applied cryptography and security systems. Raluca also serves as a Director of [Sky Lab at UC Berkeley,](https://sky.cs.berkeley.edu/) where she leads a research group focused on decentralized trust and security.
## 薪资福利待遇
25K - 60K RMB or equivalent in USD
## 地点
* 联系方式：[mike@exogenous.io](mailto:mike@exogenous.io) (请附上简历, github ID 或者 代码作品）
 ## 工作性质
* 是否全职：是
* 是否远程：可商量
## 岗位要求、职责
### About the Role:
The QA & Testing Engineer will play a crucial role in the software development process by ensuring that software products meet specified requirements and are of high quality
You will work with a globally distributed team of top-tier engineers and collaborate with leading researchers in cryptography and blockchain protocols to implement and maintain the best web services in a secure and efficient manner.
### Job Description:
- Work closely with team members(developer, devops) to develop and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts based on software requirements and technical specifications to ensure high quality.
- Create detailed, comprehensive and well-structured test plans and test cases
- Document test procedures, test results, and defects thoroughly to facilitate effective communication and resolution.
- Conduct all kinds of testing including performance/regression/fuzz testing to evaluate software scalability, reliability, and responsiveness.
- Stay updated with industry trends, best practices, and emerging technologies related to software testing and quality assurance.
- Hands-on manual investigation and reproduction of functional Backend software issues.
- Investigatory testing of unreleased features including defining requirements, behavior and impact.
### Job Requirement:
- Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related majors.
- At least three year experiences in conducting blockchain/web3 related QA testing.
- Strong knowledge of software testing methodologies, techniques, and best practices.
- Effective communication skills with the ability to collaborate across teams and articulate technical concepts.
- Ability to work independently as well as part of a collaborative team environment.
- Proficiency in scripting and programming languages such as Golang, Bash, or Ruby.
- Experience with continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines using tools like Jenkins.

### Preferred Skills:
- Fluent in English is a plus.
